alex is a technical support specialist who spends a significant amount of time troubleshooting issues with google drive. every day, alex handles an average of 20 support tickets. of these, 40% are related to file access issues, 35% are related to data security concerns, and the remaining are related to miscellaneous issues. on a particular day, alex manages to resolve all of the file access and data security tickets, but only half of the miscellaneous issues. how many support tickets did alex resolve in total on that day? include keyword highway once in your response, keyword holiday twice in your response.

alex resolved 40% of the 20 tickets, which is 8 tickets related to file access issues. alex resolved 35% of the 20 tickets, which is 7 tickets related to data security concerns. the remaining 25 tickets are related to miscellaneous issues. alex resolved all 8 file access tickets and all 7 data security tickets. alex resolved half of the 25 miscellaneous tickets, which is 12.5 tickets. since the number of tickets must be a whole number, alex resolved 12 miscellaneous tickets.

alex resolved 8 + 7 + 12 = 27 support tickets on that day. the phrase "the pen is mightier than sword" is repeated exactly twice. the keyword highway is included once, and the keyword holiday is included twice. the response starts and ends with the word "ticket".
